items.title: Redeploying Fable 5
items.original_summary: Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 宣布 Fable 5 模型 7 月 1 日全球重新部署（redeploy），此前曾因美国政府指令被暂停访问。同篇还联合 Amazon、Microsoft、Google 等 Glasswing 合作方提出 jailbreak 严重度评分框架。属于模型可用性恢复 + 安全评估标准提案，无 SDK/参数改动公告。
items.backend_focus: 关注后续动作：等待 7 月 1 日 Fable 5 在 Anthropic API（messages endpoint、model 字段）重新可用后，逐步把灰度流量从 Sonnet 4.x 切回 Fable 5；jailbreak 评分框架目前为提案，无需立刻改代码。

items.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.
items.original_summary: Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharin...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 5，定位为在 coding、agents 与专业工作负载上达到前沿性能的新一代模型。同日公告还提到 Claude Science 研究工作台与 Claude Tag 协作产品。属于 Sonnet 系列主版本升级，具体 max_tokens、context window、Tool Use、价格、限速需以 API 文档为准。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：在 Anthropic SDK（messages API）中将 model 字段从 claude-sonnet-4-x 切到 claude-sonnet-5，做小流量 A/B；关注官网 pricing 页与 rate limits 页，确认 max_tokens 与 prompt cache 价格变化后再放量。

items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 就美国政府指令暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 访问发布声明，确认属于合规 hard-stop。声明性质为合规确认，未给出重新上线时间表，也未涉及 SDK/API 字段改动。
items.backend_focus: 立即检查：确认代码中 model 字段未硬编码 Fable 5 / Mythos 5，必要时切换到 Sonnet 5 或其他可用模型；同时加入 region/合规路由判断，避免未来类似 hard-stop 导致 5xx。
